summary: Tested AI Manager Assistant feature (Feature 3). All core functionality working correctly: FAB button visible on Manager page, panel opens/closes, chat works with Gemini 2.5 Pro (Vertex AI enabled), Enter key sends messages, backdrop click closes panel. Referee role correctly does NOT see the FAB button.

ai_assistant_fab.fab_not_visible_referee: PASS - FAB correctly NOT visible for referee role on /dashboard, /games pages
ai_assistant_fab.sparkle_icon: PASS - Sparkles icon displayed in FAB button

ai_assistant_panel.welcome_message: PASS - Welcome message displayed from assistant

chat_functionality.send_via_button: PASS - Message sent when clicking send button
chat_functionality.send_via_enter: PASS - Message sent when pressing Enter key
chat_functionality.user_message_styling: PASS - User messages have blue background (#0080C8)
chat_functionality.assistant_message_styling: PASS - Assistant messages have gray background (slate-100)
chat_functionality.ai_response: PASS - Gemini 2.5 Pro responds to messages (Vertex AI is enabled)

panel_close_behavior.close_button: PASS - Panel closes via close button (with exit animation)
panel_close_behavior.backdrop_click: PASS - Panel closes when clicking backdrop overlay

test_cases_verified: Manager page shows floating AI Assistant button (sparkle icon) in bottom-right corner - PASS
Clicking the floating button opens the AI Assistant slide-in panel - PASS
Panel has header with 'AI Assistant' title and 'Gemini 2.5 Pro' subtitle - PASS
Panel has close button that closes the panel - PASS
Panel shows welcome message from the assistant - PASS
Panel has text input and send button - PASS
Typing a message and pressing Enter adds the user message to the chat - PASS
Typing a message and clicking Send adds the user message to the chat - PASS
The assistant responds (Vertex AI is enabled and working) - PASS
Chat messages are properly styled (user messages in blue, assistant in gray) - PASS
Panel is not visible for referee users - PASS
Panel backdrop click closes the panel - PASS

login_flows.demo_referee: PASS - referee@demo.com/Referee123 → /dashboard → AI FAB NOT visible

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
AI integration with Firebase AI Logic (Vertex AI) working correctly
Function declarations for game creation, tournament creation, referee assignment properly defined
System prompt builder includes current context (tournaments, games, referees)
Error handling for Vertex AI not enabled case is implemented but not triggered (Vertex AI is enabled)
Chat state is local (not persisted to Firestore) as designed
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Manager Assistant (Feature 3) is fully functional. Vertex AI is enabled in the Firebase project and Gemini 2.5 Pro responds to messages. The AI can understand requests for tournament creation, game scheduling, and referee assignment. The FAB button only appears on the /manager page for manager role users. All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes.

notes.vertex_ai_status: ENABLED - Gemini 2.5 Pro is responding to messages
